scripts.clean:all: node clean.js && cd tauri && rm -rf src-tauri/target
scripts.build:all: node build.js && cd tauri && npm install && npm run tauri:build
scripts.publish:local: npm run clean && npm run publish:prepare && cd dist/chronicle-npm && rm -f chronicle-*.tgz && npm pack && npm install -g chronicle-*.tgz
scripts.release: node clean.js && node scripts/generate-version.js --write && node build.js && node publish.js --local-publish && cd tauri && npm install && node scripts/update-version.js && npx tauri build
